## Goal

Describe the desired outcome.

## Context

What project week, subsystem, or deliverable does this support?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Clear result is documented or implemented.
- [ ] Relevant docs, code, or test artifacts are updated.
- [ ] Verification steps are recorded.

## Notes

Add links, diagrams, logs, or reference details.
